title: KDIGO 2024 CKD Management CDS Rules
title_zh: KDIGO 2024 慢性腎臟病管理指南 - 臨床決策支援規則
description: Clinical decision support rules derived from KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease

acr_categories.description_zh: 中度增加 (微量白蛋白尿)
重度增加 (巨量白蛋白尿)

SGLT2i.name: SGLT2 Inhibitor
SGLT2i.note: Recommended for CKD with eGFR ≥20 mL/min

ACEi.name: ACE Inhibitor
ACEi.name_zh: 血管收縮素轉化酶抑制劑

ARB.name: Angiotensin Receptor Blocker
ARB.name_zh: 血管收縮素受體阻斷劑

medications_caution.description: Medications requiring dose adjustment or caution in CKD
medications_caution.description_zh: CKD 患者需調整劑量或謹慎使用的藥物

items.reason: May worsen renal function, avoid in eGFR <30
Dose adjustment required: reduce dose if eGFR 30-45, contraindicated if eGFR <30
Renally excreted, requires dose adjustment in CKD

recommendations.text: We recommend treating patients with T2D, CKD, and eGFR ≥20 mL/min/1.73m² with an SGLT2i.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議第二型糖尿病合併 CKD 且 eGFR ≥20 mL/min 的患者使用 SGLT2i。

recommendations.text: We suggest treating patients with CKD without T2D with an SGLT2i when eGFR ≥20 mL/min/1.73m².
recommendations.text_zh: 建議無糖尿病的 CKD 患者，若 eGFR ≥20 mL/min，可考慮使用 SGLT2i。

recommendations.text: Once initiated, SGLT2i may be continued even if eGFR falls below 20 mL/min/1.73m², unless not tolerated or kidney replacement therapy is initiated.
recommendations.text_zh: 一旦開始使用 SGLT2i，即使 eGFR 降至 20 mL/min 以下仍可繼續使用，除非無法耐受或開始腎臟替代療法。

sections.title: RAS Inhibitor Therapy
sections.title_zh: 腎素-血管收縮素系統抑制劑治療

recommendations.text: We recommend starting ACEi or ARB for patients with high blood pressure, CKD, and severely increased albuminuria (ACR ≥300 mg/g) with or without diabetes.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議高血壓合併 CKD 且有嚴重蛋白尿 (ACR ≥300 mg/g) 的患者，無論是否有糖尿病，應開始使用 ACEi 或 ARB。

recommendations.text: We suggest starting ACEi or ARB for patients with high blood pressure, CKD, and moderately increased albuminuria (ACR 30-300 mg/g) with or without diabetes.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議高血壓合併 CKD 且有中度蛋白尿 (ACR 30-300 mg/g) 的患者，無論是否有糖尿病，考慮開始使用 ACEi 或 ARB。

recommendations.text: We recommend titrating ACEi or ARB to the maximum approved or highest tolerated dose to achieve the benefits for which these agents have been shown to be effective.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議將 ACEi 或 ARB 調整至最大核准劑量或最高耐受劑量，以達到最佳療效。

recommendations.text: We recommend a non-steroidal MRA with proven kidney and cardiovascular benefit for patients with T2D, eGFR ≥25 mL/min/1.73m², normal serum potassium, and albuminuria (ACR ≥30 mg/g) who are already treated with maximum tolerated dose of ACEi or ARB.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議第二型糖尿病合併 eGFR ≥25、血鉀正常、且有蛋白尿 (ACR ≥30) 的患者，在已使用最大耐受劑量 ACEi/ARB 的情況下，加用 Finerenone。

recommendations.text: We suggest targeting a systolic blood pressure <120 mmHg in patients with high blood pressure and CKD, when tolerated, using standardized office BP measurement.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議 CKD 合併高血壓患者，若可耐受，應將收縮壓控制在 120 mmHg 以下。

recommendations.text: We recommend treatment with a statin or statin/ezetimibe combination in patients aged ≥50 years with eGFR <60 mL/min/1.73m² but not treated with chronic dialysis or kidney transplantation.
recommendations.text_zh: 建議年齡 ≥50 歲且 eGFR <60 mL/min 的 CKD 患者 (非透析或移植) 使用 Statin 或 Statin/Ezetimibe 組合治療。

recommendations.text: Monitor eGFR and ACR at least annually in patients with CKD. More frequent monitoring is needed for higher risk patients (lower eGFR, higher ACR, or rapid progression).
recommendations.text_zh: CKD 患者應至少每年監測 eGFR 及 ACR。高風險患者 (eGFR 較低、ACR 較高或快速惡化者) 需更頻繁監測。

recommendations.text: Monitor serum potassium regularly in patients on ACEi, ARB, or MRA therapy, particularly when initiating or increasing doses.
recommendations.text_zh: 使用 ACEi、ARB 或 MRA 的患者應定期監測血鉀，尤其在起始或增加劑量時。

recommendations.text: Avoid NSAIDs in patients with CKD, particularly those with eGFR <30 mL/min/1.73m².
recommendations.text_zh: CKD 患者應避免使用 NSAIDs，尤其是 eGFR <30 mL/min 的患者。

recommendations.text: Reduce metformin dose by 50% when eGFR falls below 45 mL/min/1.73m², and discontinue when eGFR falls below 30 mL/min/1.73m².
recommendations.text_zh: 當 eGFR 降至 45 mL/min 以下時，應將 Metformin 劑量減半；eGFR 降至 30 mL/min 以下時應停用。

recommendations.text: Reduce sulfonylurea doses in patients with decreased eGFR to reduce hypoglycemia risk. Consider switching to agents with lower hypoglycemia risk.
recommendations.text_zh: eGFR 降低的患者應減少 Sulfonylurea 劑量以降低低血糖風險，可考慮改用低血糖風險較低的藥物。

recommendations.text: Refer to nephrology services for evaluation and management when eGFR <30 mL/min/1.73m² (G4-G5), persistent significant albuminuria (ACR ≥300), or rapid eGFR decline (>5 mL/min/year).
recommendations.text_zh: 當 eGFR <30 mL/min (G4-G5)、持續嚴重蛋白尿 (ACR ≥300)、或 eGFR 快速下降 (>5 mL/min/年) 時，應轉介腎臟科。
